channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Warwick Streamer CT 2008 - Chrome Tone — $3,500
item.description:
$3,500 · Very Good · riley's bass shop

Here I have a Warwick Streamer CT 5 string for sale. This model was built in 2008. The finish has aged very nicely while still having been well cared for and maintained. Previous owner said that the owner before them had a sticker on the headstock and they removed it, explains the chipping on the headstock. Unmistakable Warwick growl, all original electronics and hardware. This bass is incredibly reliable and built to destroy. Prior owners and myself have given it lots of love. I will give it a full cleaning and it will be packed very nicely prior to shipping. I'll put fresh strings on it and include an extra set on the house. It will be shipped out in a nice and sturdy Maruszczyk softshell case. Reach out to me if you got any questions!

item.title: 1966 Fender Jazz Bass neck with dots and binding (and an identity crisis). Free Shipping! — $995
item.description:
$995 · Very Good · rockdoc11

1966 Fender Jazz Bass neck with dots and binding (and an identity crisis). Free Shipping!

This poor thing has been sitting in the back of my closet for several decades now, waiting for a project that never quite happened.

As the date code on the neck indicates, this is a Fender Jazz Bass neck from March 7, 1966. The story I got with it is that the original owner back in 1966 decided that he liked the look of the old 1950s Fender “Tele” style headstocks better than the larger headstock that Fender introduced in 1957 on the Precision Bass. So he cut this one down to look like that.

The truss rod turns easily in both directions. There is a bit of “crazing” in the finish, but nothing extreme. There is some fret wear, but again nothing extreme. There is a bit of thumb wear on the back of the neck at the third and fifth fret positions (lots of G and A root playing, I'd guess.)

Please review my seller ratings so that you can purchase with complete confidence.

The neck will be securely packaged, and will be shipped within 48 hours of purchase.

Free shipping!

Thanks!

item.title: Fender American Ultra II Precision Bass with Ebony Fretboard Texas Tea — $1,600
item.description:
$1,600 · Very Good · BigRigNoGig

Awesome bass in good lightly used shape. Comes with OHSC. More details below. 

Cosmetic Condition:

Looks good overall with minimal signs of use. May show mild signs of handling but nothing noteworthy. 

Players Notes:

Plays well with good action. Everything in good working order. Straight neck and good frets. Weighs 9lbs 4oz. I ship right away.

item.title: Fender JB62-WAL Jazz Bass Reissue MIJ 2013 Walnut w/ Gig Bag — $1,395
item.description:
$1,395 · Excellent · A Flash Flood of Gear

This Fender JB62-WAL Jazz Bass Reissue plays and sounds great! This bass is comprised of an ash body, "C" shape maple neck, and rosewood fretboard. The stock JB single coil pickups provide a warm, vintage tone.

This bass is in excellent shape has obviously been well kept. There is only light surface scratches throughout the body from normal play and a few small dings located on the back of the neck and headstock. The frets still have plenty of life and the electronics work as they should.

This bass is all original.

Pickup Readings:
Middle: 5.1k ohms
Bridge: 5.3k ohms

This guitar comes freshly set up with D'addario EXL170 (45-100) Bass Roundwound strings.

Includes the pictured Fender gig bag. 

Make: Fender
Model: JB62-WAL Jazz Bass Reissue MIJ
Year: 2013
Fretboard Material: Rosewood
Fretboard Radius: 7.25"
Scale length: 34"
Weight: 8.49 pounds
Nut Width: 1.51"
Neck Width at 12th fret: 2.21"
Neck Thickness at 1st fret: 0.82"
Neck Thickness at 12th fret: 0.95"
Case/bag: Includes the pictured gig bag
Made in Japan

We have shipped hundreds of instruments and other music related items and can assure you that your new gear will be packed professionally with the utmost care, using high quality materials.

Please see pictures for exact condition and details.

If you have any questions please let us know. Thanks for looking!

item.title: HONDO FAME SERIES 8200 ELECTRIC BASS BLACK 1980'S VINTAGE (USED) — $299.99
item.description:
$299.99 · Good · Harper's Music Store

HONDO FAME SERIES 8200 ELECTRIC BASS BLACK 1980'S VINTAGE (USED)

This is a Used Bass in Good Condition. It was made in the 1980's. It has plenty of wear but plays and sound great.
Please view pictures and approve condition before purchasing. Does not come with a case.

***PICKUP ONLY***

Here is some info from the web (please check for accuracy):

 The Hondo Fame Series 8200 is a 1980s vintage electric bass featuring a Precision Bass-style design with no pickguard and rear-mounted electronics. Known for its sleek build, thin neck profile, and punchy pickup, the 8200 is widely considered a budget-friendly modding platform. Key Specs & Features
  • Body: Generally solid wood, though the body material can vary (some 80s models were constructed from plywood).
  • Electronics: P-style pickup with rear-mounted controls (typically Volume and Tone).
  • Neck: Slim, comfortable mahogany or similar hardwood neck.
  • Weight: Usually ranges between 8 lbs to 9 lbs.

item.title: Gibson Victory Standard Bass 1981 - Red — $1,050
item.description:
$1,050 · Very Good · Don’s Gear Locker

This is a 1981 Gibson Victory Bass. Bought this not too long ago, but shortly thereafter I found an Artist Model that I wanted, and a true Custom Model. Certainly don’t need three of them so putting this one up for sale. Looks and plays great. Weights 10.12 pounds. Case is in great shape, nice and clean inside. Hard to find these in this condition after all these years. Packed and ready to go, so other pictures are available. Listing is open to the US Lower 48 Only! NO INTERNATIONAL SHIPPING! Sorry.

item.title: Fender 75th Anniversary Player II Precision Bass - Daphne Blue — $889.92
item.description:
$889.92 · Brand New · Wentworth Music

Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender® sound and style with the Player II Precision Bass® - a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.

The Player II Precision Bass radiates timeless Fender charm, but under the hood, it's primed for today's players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability, from the Modern "C"-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5"-radius slab rosewood or maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. A classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and never-before-seen colours unearthed from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil P bass® pickups offer sweet highs, musical mids and seismic lows that elevate any genre. An adjustable 4-saddle bridge, single-groove steel saddles and open-gear tuners ensure precise tuning stability for the flexibility to explore endless sonic possibilities.

Perfect for crafting your own sound, the Player II Precision Bass has the looks, tone and feel that only a Fender delivers.

Features• 75th Anniversary Limited colours
• 75th Anniversary Neck Plate
• Contoured Alder Body
• Modern "C" Neck Profile
• 9.5"-Radius Maple or Rosewood Fingerboard with Rolled Edges
• Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil Precision Bass® Pickups

SpecificationsGeneral
Series: Limited Edition 75th Anniversary Precision Bass Collection
Orientation: Right-Hand
Country of Origin: Mexico
Case/Gig Bag: Sold separately

Neck
Neck Material: Maple
Neck Finish: Satin Urethane
Neck Shape: Modern "C"
Fingerboard Radius: 9.5" (241 mm)
Fingerboard Material: Rosewood
Position Inlays: White Dot
Side Dots: White
Number of Frets: 20
String Nut: Synthetic Bone
Nut Width: 1.625" (41.3 mm)
Nut Material: Synthetic Bone
Fret Size: Medium Jumbo
Scale Length: 34" (864 mm)

Body
Body: Alder
Body Finish: Polyester
Body Shape: Precision Bass®
Body Style: Solid Body
Body Material: Alder

Hardware
Bridge: 4-Saddle Bridge with Single-Groove Steel "Barrel" Saddles
Pickguard: 3-Ply Parchment
Pickup Covers: Black
Control Knobs: Knurled Flat-Top
Hardware Finish: Nickel/Chrome
Tuning Machines: Standard Open-Gear
Strings: Fender® USA 7250M Nickel Plated Steel (.045-.105 Gauges)
Neck Plate: 4-Bolt

Electronics
Middle Pickup: Player Series Alnico 5 Split Single-Coil Precision Bass®
Pickup Configuration: S
Controls: Master Volume, Master Tone
Switching: None

item.title: Fender Limited Edition Vintera II Road Worn '60s Precision Bass 2025 - Fiesta Red — $1,299
item.description:
$1,299 · Excellent · DOWNBEAT MUSIC CENTER

CONDITION: MINT CONDITION. Almost no play time on this bass - CURRENTLY HAS FLATWOUND STRINGS. No marks or wear of any kind anywhere, OTHER THAN FACTORY WEAR. Was purchased new and never used. Part of a collection. Buy with confidence.

Fender Hard Case Included | Guitar Weighs 8.55 lbs

Revive the timeless sound of the '60s with the Vintera® II Road Worn® '60s Precision Bass® and experience the iconic looks, inspiring feel and incomparable tone that only a Fender® can deliver.

Featuring a variety of vintage colors finished in Road Worn® aged nitrocellulose lacquer, the Vintera® II Road Worn® '60s Precision Bass® recreates the look and feel of a well-played classic. The ‘60s “C”-shape maple neck with 7.25" radius rosewood fingerboard and vintage-tall frets provides supreme comfort and outstanding feel. Under the hood, you'll find a vintage-style '60s split-coil Precision pickup that delivers all the warm, dynamic and powerful tone that made Fender® famous. The vintage-style 4-saddle bridge and vintage-style tuning machines provide classic looks with enhanced intonation and tuning stability to complete the package.

Experience the unmistakable vintage feel and unmatched sound of a classic Fender with the Vintera® II Road Worn® ‘60s Precision Bass® today.

FEATURES
-Alder Body Road Worn® Nitrocellulose lacquer finish
-7.25" Radius Rosewood Fingerboard with Vintage Tall Frets
-Early-'60s "C"-Shape Neck with Road Worn® Nitrocellulose lacquer Finish
-Vintage-Style Early-'60s Split-Coil Pickup
-Vintage-Style Reverse Open-Gear Tuning Machines
-4-Saddle Vintage-Style Bridge with Threaded Steel Saddles

HIGHLIGHTS
ALDER BODY AND ROAD WORN® NITROCELLULOSE LACQUER FINISH
A classic Fender tonewood known for resonance, punch and clarity. Alder has a balanced and lively tone with beefy mids and a robust low-end. Combined with a Road Worn® nitrocellulose lacquer finish that gives this Precision Bass® the authentic appearance and intimate feel of a long-time player’s favorite.
7.25” RADIUS ROSEWOOD FRETBOARD WITH VINTAGE TALL FRETS
The 7.25” radius fingerboard provides vintage comfort and feel, while vintage-tall frets provide slightly more height than vintage for big bends and wide vibrato.
EARLY- ‘60S “C” SHAPE NECK WITH ROAD WORN® NITROCELLULOSE LACQUER FINISH
Based on a ‘60s “C” profile, this comfortably rounded “C” gradually thickens toward the 12th fret for a comfortably full and inviting feel.
VINTAGE-STYLE EARLY- ‘60S SPLIT-COIL PICKUP
Voiced to replicate the woody thump that put the Precision Bass® on the map, this split-coil packs a mighty wallop with thick and deep lows, complex mids and percussive top. This ‘60s spec Precision pickup is full of the tone that made Fender® instruments famous.
VINTAGE-STYLE REVERSE OPEN-GEAR TUNING MACHINES
Traditional in both form and function, these vintage-style tuning machines deliver proven tuning precision with classic Fender® style
4-SADDLE VINTAGE-STYLE BRIDGE WITH THREADED STEEL SADDLES
A vintage-style four-saddle bridge with threaded steel saddles provides solid tuning stability and precise intonation.

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass MIM 2021 - White — $495
item.description:
$495 · Excellent · Don’s Gear Locker

This is essentially a NOS 2021 Fender MIM Jazz Bass. Bought last year and never played.This is NOT stamped used on the back of the headstock. First run stuff, needs a permanent home. Tested for this listing, everything works 100%. Certainly upgradable should you choose that route. Weights 8.12 pounds. Priced to sell, packed and ready to go, so no other pictures are available. Listing is open to the US Lower 48 Only! NO INTERNATIONAL SHIPPING! Sorry NO bag or case, but is packed very well for shipping.

item.title: AIO JB4 4 String Jazz Bass - Blue Burst — $489
item.description:
$489 · Brand New · All In One Guitar [AIO Custom & Wolf]



We made this beautiful passive Jazz Bass at an affordable price for players who wants that classic jazz bass sound! The sound quality and feel/playability is incredible and it's worth beyond $1000 bass out there. I've recorded with this bass and also with a live setting, I still can't believe how great sounding bass this is! Great sustain and vibrates through the body and whatever you play with your finger it translates directly to the output. As you already know, we are known for offering a professional setup including fret dressing and leveling so this bass will be play in your hands like a dream! I can't explain how good this bass sounds! Buy with confidence!

Specs
Body : Basswood
Top : Flame Maple Veneer
Neck : Maple
Nut Spacing : 38mm
Bridge Spacing : 19mm
Nut : Bone Nut
Fingerboard : Ebony
Pick up : AIO custom wound
Scale Length : 34"

About All in One Guitars
We run a humble one-stop guitar shop in Los Angeles.
We are a team of great guitar/bass players, builders and repairers. The owner of AIO and all of the staff and luthiers are professional musicians with 30-40 years of experience.
You can find many guitars/basses anywhere but we are confident that the ones from our shop are better than the ones you get from big corporate shops.
Anyone that has done business with All in One Guitars can confirm that we focus on playability so our setup standard is incredibly high. Our guitar set-ups are custom shop quality and the playability and feel is off the charts.
You are paying not just for the price of the instrument, but also for our close attention and care for it. We deal with honesty and integrity and we make sure that the instrument feels good in your hands. We want to share our quality instruments and let everyone enjoy and love music with the ease of playing.

We hope that you can make purchases with the confidence of knowing that not a single instrument leaves our store without receiving our utmost care.

item.title: Hardluck Kings Spider Metallic Green Electric Bass Guitar — $299.99
item.description:
$299.99 · Very Good · B Major Music

Sounds and plays so good! Straight neck. Fully functional. Some slight splits in the finish along seams. Slight cosmetic blemishes, nothing major. A great set neck bass!


Don't miss your chance to own!


Items only come with case or accessories if pictured or listed in the listing.

Items only come with accessories/parts pictured and or listed in the listing.

Items are all setup to play each note unless otherwise listed. Items may have to be setup by user for personal preference.


INTERNATIONAL BUYERS!! If the shipping price is very high for you we recommend you using a service such as Shipito or PlanetExpress which will provide you with a USA address and forward on to your country. These are well reviewed and offer great service. Message us if you need assistance. We can usually provide estimated weight and dimensions. Non-Continental USA send us a message.   


Returns are subject to 10% restocking fee. 

Returns will be required to have the original packaging supplies and shipping box. If you destroy or dispose of the packaging or shipping box you forfeit ability to return item for defects or any other reason. If item arrives in different condition than listing buyer must contact us and await further instructions. 


We are committed to excellence in serving you, if you have any questions feel free to message.


Your item will ship within 1-3 business days of payment received. Tracking provided.

Extra shipping outside lower 48 US States.


Thank you!

item.title: Fender Artist Series Duff McKagan Deluxe Precision Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2019 - Present - Black — $1,099
item.description:
$1,099 · Excellent · Spaceman Guitars

Super clean. Rarely played!! No issues. I’m including a deluxe Fender gig bag too!!

item.title: Sadowsky MetroLine MJ - Black satin Bass Guitar — $3,100
item.description:
$3,100 · Very Good · BAMonBASS Gear Emporium

Sadowsky MetroLine 21-fret Vintage M/J Bass, Swamp Ash Body, 5-string - Nirvana Black Transparent Satin Finish, plays and sounds great, weighs 8lbs 2oz


Made in Germany with top-level

  • Super-resonant chambered American swamp ash body with comfortable vintage-inspired contours
  • Comfortable bolt-on maple neck and fast-playing 12-inch-radius fingerboard with 21 nickel-silver frets
  • Just-A-Nut III facilitates impossibly low action for near-effortless playability
  • Passive MM- and J-style pickups yield an ear-grabbing blend of low-end fatness and crispy-sounding midrange
  • 2-way active preamp includes volume, balance, VTC, and stacked treble/bass knobs
  • Vintage Tone Control (VTC) knob rolls off your high end as you dial it down
  • Push-pull pot on the VTC knob bypasses the active preamp for lower-output applications
  • Includes ultra-reliable tuning machine heads, a rock-solid bridge with quick string release, and a stress-free locking strap system
  • High-quality UV finish and gleaming chrome hardware

item.title: Sandberg California VS Lionel Short Scale 4 - Green Burst — $1,699
item.description:
$1,699 · Excellent · DOWNBEAT MUSIC CENTER

Pickguard still has original plastic film on it, but there are some marks on the pickguard around the strings - probably from playing "slap bass" style. Part of a collection. Buy with confidence. NEED MORE PHOTOS? JUST ASK.

INCLUDES ORIGINAL GIG BAG.

item.title: Variax Line 6 BassWith Gig Bag — $695
item.description:
$695 · Excellent · Uptempo Music

This bass is in excellent condition. It has the ability to emulate many different electric instruments, as well as many other amazing features, it’s a great purchase for someone looking to get lots of opportunity from one instrument.

Comes with a gig bad that has backpack straps and many front pockets, cable, line 6 XPS-DI, XPS-DI power cable, manual, and other accessories shown.

Please ask any questions before purchasing.

item.title: Vintage 1967 Teisco/St.George Short-Scale Walnut Bass Made in JAPAN. Serviced. Sounds Great !... — $249
item.description:
$249 · Good · Mustorg

This is Beautiful and Rare
Teisco/St.George Short Scale(25.5") Bass.
Aprox. 1967 Made in JAPAN
Pretty Rare Vintage Instrument.
Good working Condition ! Recently Serviced with New Volume Pot, Tone Pot and Jack Socket. New Tuners. New String Bridge.
Professionally striped and refinished back to natural Dark Walnut with Clear matte finish. Has a few surface nick and dents on the corners, back side of the body and neck. Some surface blemishes all around(See the Pictures...) But Nothing Major. Just a regular wear.
Bass still in a Great working shape. Genuine and powerful 1967 Teisco Pickup. 5.8kO
Solid Walnut body. Walnut neck with a Rosewood fretboard. New Truss Rod Link. Frets in a good condition. Neck is Not perfect and action not perfect low, but still playable with no buzzing on a most of the frets.
New 40-90 Strings. Everything works. Sounds really Amazing.
Very Nice Bass !

item.title: ESP LTD B-206SM 2019 - Present - Natural Satin — $410
item.description:
$410 · Very Good · Dustin's Gear Depot

LTD B-206SM Bass Guitar - Natural Satin

This bass is in perfect working order and has seen only a handful of hours of playing since I purchased it. I'm the original owner.

Cosmetically, it's in great condition overall. The only notable flaws are a couple of dings on the front edge of the body (shown in the photos). The satin finish on this model appears to be quite thick, so the dings are mostly in the finish rather than the wood itself - see photos.

No case/bag included. I'm primarily a drummer, and I'm thinning out gear that I don't use to make room for more drum stuff.

- Number of Strings: 6

- Left-/Right-handed: Right-handed

- Body Shape: LTD B Series

- Body Material: Ash (body), Spalted Maple (top)

- Color: Natural

- Body Finish: Satin

- Neck Material: 5-piece Maple/Jatoba

- Neck Shape: Thin U

- Neck Joint: Bolt-on

- Fingerboard Material: Roasted Jatoba

- Fingerboard Inlay: Dots

- Number of Frets: 24, Extra Jumbo

- Scale Length: 35"

- Nut Width: 2.126"

- Nut Material: Molded

- Bridge/Tailpiece: LTD DB-6

- Tuners: LTD

- Neck Pickup: ESP Designed SB-6N Humbucker

- Bridge Pickup: ESP Designed SB-6N Humbucker

- Controls: 1 x volume, 1 x balance control, 3-band active EQ

- Strings: D'Addario XL, .030-.125

- Manufacturer Part Number: LB206SMNS

item.title: G&L Fullerton Deluxe SB-2 - Andromeda — $1,175
item.description:
$1,175 · Excellent · DOWNBEAT MUSIC CENTER

CONDITION: MINT CONDITION. Unplayed. No marks or wear of any kind anywhere. Was purchased new and never used. Part of a collection. Buy with confidence.

INCLUDES ORIGINAL GIG BAG AND ALL ORIGINAL PAPERWORK.

WEIGHT: 9.4 pounds

Leo's Own Take on the P/J with a very comfortable body and a neck profile to match, simple controls and outstanding pickups!

When Leo Fender launched the G&L SB-2 bass in 1982, he packed his latest innovations in pickup and bridge design into a straightforward, hard-working bass. If you prefer a less-is-more aesthetic but hunger for something meatier, the SB-2 is just the ticket.

The SB-2 starts with a familiar shape, though subtle modifications to its sculpting make it more sleek and balanced. Strap it on and it immediately feels at home, yet somehow more comfortable than you expected. The slim, C-shaped neck falls immediately to hand, checking in with a comfortable 9 1/2" radius and 21 Jescar 57110 medium-jumbo nickel-silver frets ready to deliver silky playability.

Once the SB-2 has nestled into your comfort zone, it’s time to experience just how far Leo evolved the classic duo of split-coil and single coil pickups. You see, these Magnetic Field Design interpretations were created by Leo to give you more gusto without losing detail and finesse. A simple dual-volume control setup allows you to strike any balance between the two, even backing off both volumes to dial in a more vintage flavor. What’s more, the SB-2 features an innovative Leo Fender-designed Saddle-Lock bridge to transfer string energy right into the body end-grain for an incredibly resonant instrument.

The bottom line: SB-2 brings the magic of Leo’s own reinterpretation of the P/J configuration in a bass that delivers all the tone and feel you'd expect in a "Latter Day Leo" instrument.

Made in Leo Fender’s historic G&L facility on Fender Avenue in Fullerton, California.

item.title: Schecter SLS Evil Twin 2025 - Satin Black — $1,425
item.description:
$1,425 · Excellent · The Bass Place

Schecter SLS Evil Twin-4 Bass Guitar. Excellent condition, hardly used. There is no case or gig bag with this one, it is the bass only. Finish is in great shape.

item.title: Fender American Series Jazz Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2000 - 2007 - 3-Color Sunburst — $1,199.99
item.description:
$1,199.99 · Good · Broadway Music and Pawn

Return Policy:

All sales are final. We do not accept returns, exchanges, or cancellations unless the item arrives damaged or defective.

Damaged or Defective Items

If your item arrives broken or defective, please contact us within 7 days of delivery with clear photos of the damage and the packaging. We will review the issue and, if approved, provide a refund.

Shipping Costs

Buyers are responsible for all return shipping costs. If the item is not returned in its original condition, the buyer is responsible for any loss in value.

Please ask questions to eliminate concerns before ordering an item.

Thank you for your understanding and support!

item.title: Ibanez SR5A250 SR Premium 5-String Electric Bass - Red, White and Blue — $1,299.99
item.description:
$1,299.99 · Brand New · Sims Music

Serial Number: I260302598 Weight: 8lb 9oz

In celebration of the 250th anniversary of the founding of the United States, Ibanez presents a limited-edition collection of electric guitars, basses, and premium acoustic instruments featuring custom red, white, and blue finishes. This special collection honors the artists, dealers, and players who have helped make the U.S. market an essential part of the Ibanez legacy.

Built as part of the Ibanez Premium series, this instrument combines select tonewoods, high-performance electronics, premium hardware, and exceptional craftsmanship for outstanding tone, playability, and inspiration.

  • Atlas 5-piece Panga Panga/Purpleheart neck with KTS Titanium reinforcement rods for enhanced stability and sustain
  • Panga Panga fretboard with tight lows, focused mids, and crisp attack
  • Medium frets with Premium fret edge treatment for smooth, comfortable playability
  • African Mahogany body for rich sustain and pleasant brightness
  • Nordstrand Big Break pickups delivering powerful, full-bodied tone with single-coil clarity and noiseless performance
  • Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ with 3-way mid-frequency switch
  • EQ bypass switch with passive tone control
  • Gotoh machine heads for precise, reliable tuning
  • MR5S bridge with adjustable string spacing
  • Ibanez gig bag included

Specifications

  • Output Jack: ¼" stereo barrel (angled face mount)
  • Back/Side Material: Ash
  • Nut: GraphTech Black TUSQ XL (45mm)
  • Hardware Color: Black
  • String Gauge: .045/.065/.085/.105/.130 (D'Addario EXL165 + .130)
  • Factory Tuning: 1G,2D,3A,4E,5B (E Standard)
  • Bridge Pickup: Nordstrand Big Break passive
  • Neck Pickup: Nordstrand Big Break passive
  • Bridge: MR5S fixed (16.5mm string spacing)
  • Number of Frets: 24
  • Fret: medium nickel silver (Premium edge treatment)
  • Fretboard: Ebony
  • Top/Back/Body: Solid Body

item.title: Squier Paranormal Rascal Bass HH - Shell Pink — $389.99
item.description:
$389.99 · Mint · T-Town Music Shop

About this bass:
Weight: 9.4 pounds
This bass was sent directly from Squier to my supplier as part of an end of production run by Squier.  It has never been sold retail, the protective covers are still on the pickguard, pickups and tuners.  It was inspected by a team of factory authorized technicians.  All electronics work as designed, the neck is straight, and the set up is to factory specs. When we polished the bass we did not find any finish blemishes, dings or cracks, it is in brand new unplayed condition.  
Per agreement with Fender/Squier because this bass was not distributed through their dealer network there is a tiny used stamp on the back of the headstock and the last two digits of the stamped serial number have been removed and a sticker with the serial number has been placed over the stamped number.

Here is what Squier says about the Paranomal Rascal Bass HH:
The Paranormal Rascal bass rewrites the playbook of electric bass design with a greatest-hits-list of features from several eccentric 1960s-era Fender bass models. Combining the offset body shape of the Fender bass VI model, the unique headstock shape from the Fender Coronado bass, the string-through-body bridge from the Mustang bass, and punchy dual Fender-designed wide range humbucking bass pickups with three-way switching, this model amounts to something truly greater than the sum of its parts. Other player-friendly details of this model include a short and easy-to-play 30" scale length, a slim and comfortable "C"-shape neck profile, and a gloss neck finish for a slick yet confident feel.

**The pictures are of the actual bass that you will receive**
 

Here is how much cash you will save!
Retail Price $503.99
My Price $389.99
Save $114.00

Features

Neck

  • Shape: Slim C
  • Wood: Solid Maple
  • Neck joint: Bolt-on
  • Scale length: 30"
  • Truss rod: Single action, head adjust
  • Finish: Gloss

Pickups

  • Pickup configuration: HH
  • Neck: Proprietary
  • Bridge: Proprietary
  • Control layout: Master volume, Master tone
  • Pickup switch: 3-Way

Fretboard

  • Material: Solid Laurel
  • Fret size: Narrow-Tall
  • Number of frets: 21
  • Inlays: Offset Pearloid Dot
  • Nut material/width: 1.5" Synthetic Bone

Body

  • Body Type: Solid Body
  • Body wood: Solid Poplar
  • Body finish: Gloss

Hardware

  • Tuning machines: Vintage-style
  • Color: Chrome

FAQ, frequently asked questions


Why are instruments sent to a refurbisher?  This bass is an end of production model from Squier so they were cleaning out excess inventory from their warehouse.

Who refurbishes your instruments?  All of my instruments come from the largest and best refurbisher in the country, where any issue found is corrected by a factory trained and authorized luthier.

Does a refurbished instrument have the manufacturer warranty?  No, any instrument sent to a refurbisher, regardless of the reason it was sent there, no longer carries the manufacturer warranty. 

Will I need to set up my instrument when I receive it?  All of my instruments have been set-up before shipping, so most are ready to play out of the box.  However some instruments may need a minor adjustment after shipping due to changes in temperature, humidity, and  getting bumped around during shipping.  Also some players like to set up a new bass to their own personal preferences.

item.title: Vintage 1980s 1990s Memphis Teisco Bass Guitar K Mart Brand Mini Black Metal Head Shredder Travel Kids Guitar Youth Junior 3/4 Travel Office Tour Bus Backstage Warm Up Lightweight — $150
item.description:
$150 · Very Good · Monterey Park Guitar Shop

Vintage 1980s 1990s Memphis Teisco Bass Guitar K Mart Brand Mini Black Metal Head Shredder Travel Kids Guitar Youth Junior 3/4 Travel Office Tour Bus Backstage Warm Up Lightweight

Off brand mini travel bass guitar. Works great very clean and would make a great gift for kids or grown up travel guitar gift. Works great!

Guitar is very clean for its age. All relatively light wear and tear. The frets are in excellent condition and everything works. Overall this guitar is in great shape. The guitar has minor superficial dings, scratches, wear and tear around various parts of the guitar. Typical of a guitar of this age. Please consider this when bidding on my items.

Shipping, Payment & Important Details. 

Your item will be shipped immediately after I receive payment. I use parcel post on most items. If you need it ASAP, please contact after the sale to make arrangements. If there is problem, please contact me before leaving feedback. I will do my best to work out any issues.

International Buyers – Please Note: 

Import duties, taxes, and charges are not included in the item price or shipping cost. These charges are the buyer's responsibility. Please check with your country's customs office to determine what these additional costs will be prior to bidding or buying.

item.title: Ibanez SR500M — $425
item.description:
$425 · Good · Nathan's Stuff

2011 special edition Ibanez SR500 but with a maple neck and fretboard.

Mahogany body

34in scale

24 frets

Jazz bass neck profile

Preamp is battery powered

Comes with gig bag shown in photo

item.title: Squier FSR Classic Vibe '60s Jazz Bass 2025 - Burgundy Mist — $459.99
item.description:
$459.99 · Mint · T-Town Music Shop

About this bass:
Weight: 8.9 pounds
Year of Production: 2025
Overstock of a Fender Special Run model, ships in original box with accessories. Brand new condition but has to be sold as used because there is no factory warranty.


This bass came directly from Squier to my supplier, it has never been sold retail.  The protective covers are still on the pickups, pickguard, control plate, tuners and back plate.  All electronics were tested and are working as designed, the neck is straight and the set up is to factory specs.  
When we polished the bass we did not find any blemishes, dings or cracks, it is in new condition.
Per agreement with Fender/Squier because this bass was not distributed through their dealer network there is a tiny used stamp on the back of the headstock and the last two digits of the stamped serial number have been removed and a sticker with the serial number has been placed over the stamped number.


Here is what Squier says about the Classic Vibe 60s Jazz Bass:

A tribute to the decade of its birth, the Classic Vibe ‘60s Jazz Bass guitar combines the luxurious playability that made it famous with the versatility and massive tone of its dual Fender-Designed alnico single-coil pickups. Player-friendly features include a slim and comfortable C-shaped neck profile with an easy-playing 9.5”-radius fingerboard and narrow-tall frets, as well as a vintage-style bridge with threaded saddles. This throwback Squier model also features 1960s-inspired headstock markings, nickel-plated hardware and a slick vintage-tinted gloss neck finish for an old-school aesthetic vibe.

**The pictures are of the actual bass that you will receive**
 

Here is how much cash you will save!
Retail Price $529.99
My Price $459.99
Save $70.00

Specs

Neck

  • Shape: C
  • Wood: Maple
  • Neck joint: Bolt-on
  • Scale length: 34"
  • Truss rod: Standard
  • Finish: Vintage tint gloss

Pickups

  • Active or passive pickups: Passive
  • Pickup configuration: SS
  • Neck: Fender Designed Alnico single-coil
  • Bridge: Fender Designed Alnico single-coil
  • Brand: Fender
  • Series or parallel: Parallel

Fretboard

  • Material: Indian laurel
  • Radius: 9.5"
  • Fret size: Narrow Tall
  • Number of frets: 20
  • Inlays: Dot
  • Nut material: Bone
  • Nut width: 1.5" (38.1 mm)

Body

  • Cutaway: Double cutaway
  • Construction: Solidbody
  • Top wood: Poplar
  • Body finish: Gloss
  • Orientation: Right handed

Controls

  • Control layout: Volume 1, volume 2, master tone

Hardware

  • Bridge type: Fixed
  • Bridge design: 4-saddle vintage style with threaded steel saddles
  • Tuning machines: Open-geared vintage style
  • Color: Nickel

FAQ, frequently asked questions


Why are instruments sent to a refurbisher?  The instrument could be a discontinued model, have a finish imperfection, or need a minor repair.

Who refurbishes your instruments?  All of my instruments come from the largest and best refurbisher in the country, where any issue found is corrected by a factory trained and authorized luthier.

Does a refurbished instrument have the manufacturer warranty?  No, any instrument sent to a refurbisher, regardless of the reason it was sent there, no longer carries the manufacturer warranty. 

Will I need to set up my instrument when I receive it?  All of my instruments have been set-up before shipping, so most are ready to play out of the box.  However some instruments may need a minor adjustment after shipping due to changes in temperature, humidity, and  getting bumped around during shipping.  Also some players like to set up a new bass to their own personal preferences.

item.title: Fender American Original '60s Precision Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2020 - 2022 - Surf Green — $2,099.66
item.description:
$2,099.66 · Excellent · Bass & Tone

Fender 60s Original P bass. Only been played in bedroom and dosent have any marks or scratches! As good as new! Strung with Labella flats. Selling due to having too many basses. Buyer welcome to test before purchase. Any questions feel free! Trades and offers welcome!

item.title: Skyline series Lakeland Lakeland skyline 5 string electric bass - red — $4,500
item.description:
$4,500 · Excellent · BatWitch

Beautiful, red, 5 string Skyline Series Lakeland bass guitar. Larry Junstrom (.38 Special) was my late husband's best friend and HAM Radio buddy. Right before Larry passed away, he gave this guitar to him. I have no provenance, but I lived with these men and I know what I know. I can write a statement and have it notarized to this effect. Larry played it on the Resolution album. Is in perfect mint condition, a hard case, and a chromatic tuner.

item.title: 1980s Yamaha BB3000A bass guitar candy apple red MIJ — $3,000
item.description:
$3,000 · Excellent · Bass Monastery

1986-1989 Yamaha BB3000A.

4.25kg, grab it before it's gone!

Neck is straight, Trussrod works both way, low action, plays fast and sounds incredible.

Bridge upgraded to a vintage style one, stock bridge included.

Some playing marks. overall is in excellent condition.

Comes with an used authentic yamaha hardcase. Will be securely packed for transit.

Shipping & PoliciesCustoms Duties: All import duties and taxes are the buyer’s responsibility, except for shipments to the EU. For shipments to the United States, please contact us first to confirm details related to import fees and shipping timelines.

Shipping Options: UPS or FedEx shipping worldwide, with full tracking included. The bass will be securely packed to ensure safe delivery of this vintage instrument.

item.title: Sandberg Classic Booster 4 - Orange Burst — $1,550
item.description:
$1,550 · Excellent · DOWNBEAT MUSIC CENTER

CONDITION: MINT CONDITION. Unplayed. No marks or wear of any kind anywhere. Was purchased new and never used. Part of a collection. Buy with confidence.

Gig Bag Included | Guitar Weighs 8.65 lbs | Serial No. 36204

The Classic Booster 4-String from Sandberg combines high-performance features with elegant looks, finished in a sleek Matt Indigo over a matching matte body. The 5-piece neck—constructed from Canadian hardrock maple and mahogany—is 6-bolted for solid stability and shaped with a comfortable C-profile. A rosewood fingerboard with 24 frets, abalone face dot inlays, and a 14" (355.6 mm) radius offers smooth playability across the board.

With a 34" (864 mm) scale length, this bass is loaded with two Sandberg soapbar pickups and a Sandberg 3-band EQ with active/passive switching and a passive tone control for flexible tonal shaping. String spacing at the chrome single bridge is adjustable from 18.5 to 20 mm (0.73"–0.79"), allowing for personalized setup.

A genuine Sandberg gig bag is included.

item.title: Hagstrom HB-8-WCT 8-String Bass 2010s - Wild Cherry Transparent — $704.53
item.description:
$704.53 · Very Good · Guitars Plus

NOTE TO OUR VALUED CUSTOMERS:
We strive for your complete satisfaction and aim to accurately represent the condition of all used and vintage products in our listings. Used items will inevitably exhibit signs of play wear, while vintage models may show even more. We disclose any damage or unusual wear and provide an overall condition description relative to each instrument’s age. Please anticipate minor indentations, finish checking, and other evidence of normal use that may not always be fully captured in photographs or explicitly detailed in the listing.

We understand that everyone has their own standard for acceptable wear and tear. If the degree of play wear is particularly important to you, please contact us at the shop for a comprehensive in-hand description and to address any questions you may have. Your satisfaction is our top priority.

Shipping & Transit Damage (Guitars and Basses Only):
In the rare event that a guitar or bass sustains minor damage during shipping (such as a broken pickup selecor switch, minor binding separation, or damage to a strap pin or tuner), Guitars Plus will work with the buyer to arrange repair by a qualified technician in the customer’s local area, with the goal of returning the instrument to the condition described in the original listing. The choice of technician must be approved by Guitars Plus in advance. The customer is responsible for arranging transportation to and from the agreed-upon technician. This policy applies only to minor, repairable issues resulting from carrier handling and does not apply to amplifiers or pedals.

Setups & String Tension:
Guitars Plus is not responsible for setup costs incurred after delivery. As a best practice for safe transit, strings are slackened during shipping to reduce tension on the neck and headstock. A professional setup is typically required upon receipt to achieve optimal playability and is the responsibility of the buyer.

Returns & Return Shipping:
We do not accept returns on used gear unless the item arrives in a condition not in line with the description in the listing and a local repair resolution cannot be reached. In such cases, return shipping costs are the responsibility of the buyer. Any returned instrument must be packaged safely and appropriately. If an item is returned with inadequate packaging and arrives damaged, no refund will be issued. Refunds are issued only after the instrument has been received by Guitars Plus and confirmed to have arrived safely and in the same condition in which it was shipped.

All items are sold under Reverb’s “As-Is” policy.


SHIPPING POLICY:
Guitars Plus is a small shop managed by two individuals. We ensure prompt tracking updates to provide peace of mind regarding your shipment’s status. Occasionally, tracking information may be generated a few days before the actual shipment date. All items are shipped on Tuesdays following the purchase to optimise efficiency by allowing us to batch shipments. Buyers are responsible for paying any outstanding duties/import fees incurred subject to their state of residence. Tubes are not covered by Guitars Plus. We strive to pack every shipment with care, but tubes are fragile. Amps ship from Guitars Plus in as described condition. Any repairs required on your end upon delivery are your responsibility. Thank you for your understanding and support! Messages regarding inquiries already addressed by this policy will regrettably not receive a response.

SPEC/INFO:

Hagstrom HB-8-WCT 8-String Bass – Wild Cherry Transparent (2009, MIC) (USED)

Body: Mahogany
Neck: Maple – Oval C
Fingerboard: Resinator – 15" Radius
Scale Length: 30.75"
Nut: 1.5"
Frets: 21 Medium Jumbo
Inlays: Dots
Pickups: Hagstrom Dyna Rail
Controls: Volume, Tone
Switching: 6-Way Rotary
Bridge: Heavy Duty 8-String
Tuners: 17:1 Die-Cast
Hardware: Chrome
Finish: Wild Cherry Transparent
Features: 8-String Bass Layout, Short Scale Design, Resinator Fingerboard, Symphonic Octave Bass Tone

Condition Notes: Used.

6 way rotary switch is functional but the wiper is on its last legs. This causes occasional intermittent signal. Suitable replacement would be EP-0920-000 6-position Rotary Switch from Allparts or similar.

Exhibits general playwear.

item.title: Ken Smith Hadrien Feraud — $2,800
item.description:
$2,800 · Excellent · Musicman88

Gotta sell my dream bass. moving over seas for the foreseeable future and need the extra money.
I'm sure if your interested in this one you probably already know everything you need to about these basses.
crotch walnut top , Mahogany body, cocobolo fretboard, maple neck.

item.title: G&L Tribute Series LB-100 2026 - Olympic White — $749.99
item.description:
$749.99 · Brand New · The Zombie Guitar Company

Welcome to the Zombie Guitar Company! We're a small-town guitar shop in historic Herrin, Illinois, offering an ever-changing selection of new and used guitars and music gear. We ship fast and treat every order with care. If you have any questions, just let us know! This guitar was originally sourced through MIRC and is a 2nd.


The G&L LB•100 made its debut in the early '90s ago in response to bassists asking for more subtle evolution of the p-style platform, as compared to the SB•1 and L•1000. With a slightly streamlined body shape for improved comfort and balance, the LB•100 also brought the G&L Saddle Lock bridge for richer note definition and sustain. The Tribute Series LB•100 hits the mark, with an ideal balance to the pickup spec for vintage flavor with solid punch.


Specifications

  • CONSTRUCTION: bolt-on
  • SCALE: 34"
  • PICKUPS: G&L Alnico split-coil pickup
  • BODY WOOD: Poplar & Ash Top over Poplar
  • NECK WOOD: Hard Rock Maple with vintage tint satin finish and Maple or Rosewood fingerboard
  • NECK WIDTH AT NUT: 1 3/4"
  • NECK RADIUS: 12”
  • NECK PROFILE: medium C
  • FRETS: medium jumbo, nickel
  • TUNING KEYS: Traditional open-back
  • BRIDGE: Leo Fender-designed G&L Saddle-Lock
  • ELECTRONICS: master volume, master tone

item.title: Peavey Cirrus BXP 2000s - Natural — $630.36
item.description:
$630.36 · Excellent · Centre Musical EMF

The Peavey Cirrus BXP is a well-regarded 4-string bass known for its outstanding playability, versatility, and solid build quality. Inspired by Peavey’s flagship Cirrus series, it delivers a modern, powerful, and articulate tone suited to a wide range of musical styles.

Equipped with dual humbucking pickups and active electronics, the Cirrus BXP offers a broad tonal range—from deep, punchy lows to clear, articulate highs. Its neck-through construction provides excellent sustain and easy access to the upper frets, while its ergonomic design ensures outstanding comfort during long playing sessions.

Whether you’re playing rock, funk, jazz, metal, or recording in the studio, the Cirrus BXP is a dependable and versatile instrument.

Features

• Type: 4-string electric bass
• Construction: Neck-through design
• Pickups: Dual humbuckers
• Electronics: Active preamp with EQ
• Tone: Powerful, articulate, and versatile
• Excellent ergonomics and sustain
• Ideal for stage and studio

Condition:
• Used, excellent condition

item.title: Spector NS-2 4-String Neck Thru - Maple Burl & Swamp Ash #2284 — $7,367.03
item.description:
$7,367.03 · Brand New · Eddie's Guitars

The Spector NS-2 4-String Neck Thru is a masterfully crafted instrument that brings together premium tonewoods, elegant aesthetics, and uncompromising performance. Built with Spector's renowned neck through construction, this bass delivers exceptional sustain, effortless upper fret access, and a remarkably responsive feel that inspires confidence in every note. Finished in a natural oil finish that allows the character of the woods to shine, it presents an understated beauty that grows richer with time and use.

At the heart of the instrument is a striking bookmatched maple burl top paired with a resonant swamp ash body. The dramatic figuring of the maple burl creates a unique visual signature, while the swamp ash back contributes a balanced tonal foundation with articulate highs, defined mids, and a full yet controlled low end. The solid body construction preserves every ounce of resonance, producing a lively and dynamic voice that responds naturally to every playing style.

The 34 inch scale length is matched with a slim 3 piece maple neck featuring Spector's comfortable thin neck profile, providing fast, effortless playability across the entire fingerboard. A pale moon ebony fingerboard offers a smooth, articulate playing surface with exceptional note definition, while custom maple burl wooden crown inlays echo the beauty of the top wood. Green Luminlay side dots with black borders ensure excellent visibility on dark stages, and thoughtful custom appointments include a swamp ash headstock, a pale moon ebony truss rod cover, and a wooden pale moon headstock logo that complete the instrument's refined organic aesthetic.

Electronics are equally impressive, featuring an Aguilar AG 4P/J-HC pickup set paired with the powerful Aguilar OBP-2 preamp. This combination delivers a wide tonal palette, from warm vintage character to modern punch and clarity, with exceptional definition and low noise performance. Custom maple burl control knobs provide a seamless visual complement while offering precise control over your sound.

Premium hardware ensures dependable performance night after night. A lightweight aluminum bridge enhances resonance while reducing overall weight, and a Hipshot Bass X-Tender with UltraLite tuners allows instant Drop D tuning without sacrificing tuning stability. Black hardware creates a clean, contemporary appearance, while Dunlop Straplocks provide added security whether on stage or in the studio.

Weighing just 8 pounds 5 ounces, this NS-2 is remarkably comfortable for extended playing sessions without compromising its authoritative tone. It includes a premium hardshell case for maximum protection during transport and storage. Combining boutique craftsmanship, carefully selected tonewoods, premium electronics, and player focused appointments, this custom Spector NS-2 is an exceptional instrument that delivers inspiring performance, stunning visual appeal, and the unmistakable voice that has defined the NS legacy for decades.

Other specifications include:

  • Model NS-2-4-String Neck-Thru
  • Scale Length 34"
  • Nut Width (4-String) Standard - 1.64"
  • Construction Top & Back Option
  • Bookmatched Top Woods Maple Burl
  • Back Woods Swamp Ash
  • Customer Selected Top Wood Yes
  • Weight Relief Solid / No Weight Relief
  • Neck Wood 3-Piece Maple
  • Neck Profile Thin Neck Shape
  • Fingerboard Wood Pale Moon Ebony
  • Fingerboard Type Fretted
  • Inlays Crowns - Wooden - Specify material below [Maple Burl]
  • Side Dots Green Luminlay with Black Border
  • Custom Options (Wooden Truss Rod Covers, etc.) - Specify Below (Subject to Approval) Headstock Options Swamp ash head stock/ Pale Moon truss rod cover]
  • Headstock Logo Material Wooden - Specify below [Pale Moon]
  • Finish Oil
  • Stain Natural (Clear)
  • Paint N/A - Stain Chosen
  • Pickup (4-String) Aguilar - AG 4P/J-HC Set
  • Pickup Spacing Standard
  • Electronics [OBP-2/Maple Burl knobs]
  • Bridge Material Lightweight Aluminum
  • Tuners Hipshot Bass X-Tender w/ UltraLite Set (Drop D Tuner)
  • Hardware Color Black
  • Strap Buttons Dunlop Straplocks
  • Hardshell Case
  • 8 lbs 5 oz
  • #2284

For more information about this Spector instrument, please contact us.

item.title: Super Rare!! Yamaha MB- III Motion Bass Super Edition Medium Scale - 80s JAPAN — $599
item.description:
$599 · Excellent · Aram's Gear Collection

Yamaha Motion MB-III Super Edition Bass – Pearl White – Made in Japan – 1980s

Up for sale is a vintage Yamaha Motion MB-III Super Edition bass in the desirable Pearl White finish.

Manufactured in Japan during the 1980s, this bass is part of Yamaha's highly regarded Motion series, known for its excellent build quality, comfortable medium-scale design, and versatile electronics.

This example features the sought-after PJ pickup configuration, delivering a wide range of tones—from warm and punchy Precision-style sounds to articulate Jazz Bass-inspired clarity. The medium-scale neck provides a comfortable playing experience while maintaining strong low-end response and excellent note definition.

Specifications

  • Brand: Yamaha
  • Model: Motion MB-III Super Edition
  • Era: 1980s
  • Country of Manufacture: Japan
  • Finish: Pearl White
  • Pickup Configuration: PJ (Precision + Jazz)
  • Scale Length: Medium Scale
  • Includes: Soft Gig Bag

Condition
The bass is in excellent vintage condition for its age. It has been well preserved and shows only minor signs of use consistent with a carefully maintained instrument from the 1980s. The finish presents very well, and the instrument retains its classic vintage appearance.

The Pearl White finish is significantly less common than standard black versions and gives the bass a distinctive retro Japanese aesthetic.

A fantastic opportunity to own a genuine Japanese-made Yamaha bass from the golden era of Yamaha production. These Motion series instruments have become increasingly difficult to find, especially in clean, original condition.

Feel free to contact me with any questions or requests for additional photos.

item.title: Squier P-Bass MIJ SQ Serial 1984 - 3-Color Sunburst — $1,149.99
item.description:
$1,149.99 · Very Good · Xu Strings

Squier MIJ P-Bass SQ Serial Number - 1984 - for sale in very good condition.

This is a lightweight beast of a 4-string coming in at 8 lbs 14 oz!

The electronics all work perfectly, and the cosmetic wear does not cause any playability issues.

Scale length: 34 in

Fret Radius: 7 1/4 in

Weight: 8 lbs 14 oz
Body: Basswood

Top: Basswood
Back: Basswood
Neck: Maple
Fretboard: Rosewood

Mods:
Nordstrand NP4 pickups
Solderless pots & jack
Gotoh Bridge & Gotoh Tuners

Finish chips, dings, and scratches on the body and neck. Mostly pictured.
Wear is about the same level on all sides, giving it a very nice naturally relic'd look!

This bass has been comprehensively setup in-house to the highest standard, and it is an excellent player.

~~~~~~~

This item was fully inspected for function and has been described as accurately as possible. Please inspect the pictures closely and read the ad thoroughly to understand the condition of the item. We can take close-ups at any angle on request.

Xu Strings is a full-range, boutique guitar and bass repair shop located in Rockville, MD. If we have an instrument that is "almost" what you want, talk to us - electronics, mods and projects are our thing! We are a dealer for many brands including Seymour Duncan, DiMarzio, Nordstrand, Aguilar, Bartolini, Audere, Ernie Ball, Pyramid Strings, Hipshot, LR Baggs, Fishman, K&K and more. Local transactions may be arranged and payment is accepted via cash, credit cards, Samsung Pay, Apple Pay and Paypal. Contactless options available.

We have over 20 years of experience shipping gear! Your purchase will come well-packed and fully insured.

A video chat demonstration may be arranged via Google Meet, Google Duo or Zoom. Please message us to arrange.

International shipping is available, but please message us for rates.

Returns are currently NOT accepted. Please be sure of your purchase.

Xu Strings offers consignment for your gear! Rates are easily better than the big box stores.

item.title: 1968 Fender Coronado Bass II Wildwood — $4,100
item.description:
$4,100 · Excellent · GoodmansGuitars

For sale is a beautiful 1968 Fender Coronado Bass II in the highly sought-after Wildwood finish. This bass is in excellent condition and is 100% original, including the original hard shell case.


Features:

1968 Fender Coronado Bass

Rare Wildwood finish

All original

Original Fender hard shell case included

Recently professionally set up by Taras Andre (Garrett Park Guitars)

Low action

Fresh D'Addario Chromes flatwounds

item.title: Cort GB94 2011 - Natural — $656.73
item.description:
$656.73 · Very Good · Gian Luca's Gear Garage

Cort GB94 

ACTIVE

Neck is flat and stright. 

Weight 4,0 Kg

For more pictures or details you are fill free to contact me.

More videos About the bass.



Regarding the packaging, shipping or communications between seller and buyer please read the feedback received for my basses sold in the past, usually i male the packaging in this way and i never had any problem on my shipment made in the past:

The bass will be shipped (with insurance) in a specific hard box made with two hard slidesand some thickesses put between the two slides to protect the instrument (see the last pictures "as an example for packaging made"), so is impossibile that any damage will be done on the bass during the shipment to you. More videos for the bass videos for the bass videos for the bass

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man Bongo 6 HH 6-String Bass - Stealth Black with Soft Case — $3,299
item.description:
$3,299 · Brand New · Haggerty's Music

-YOU ARE VIEWING PHOTOS OF THE ACTUAL BASS GUITAR BEING SOLD!

This brand new 9.8 lb Ernie Ball will ship insured, fully set up, and inspected from Rapid City, SD.

Buy risk free with our 14 day - full refund, less shipping, return policy.  Check out our shop policies for more details.

The Ernie Ball Music Man Bongo shattered expectations when it first appeared, proving that bold design and uncompromising performance could coexist in a single instrument. Available now at Haggerty's Music, the Bongo 6 HH represents Music Man's most advanced vision of the modern electric bass; combining ergonomic comfort, innovative electronics, and effortless playability into a professional instrument built for today's most demanding players. Its unmistakable silhouette has become synonymous with versatility, precision, and stage-ready performance.

Finished in striking Stealth Black, this six-string Bongo pairs a lightweight basswood body with a painted maple neck and smooth ebony fingerboard for a remarkably balanced feel. The sculpted double-cutaway body provides unrestricted access to all 24 stainless steel frets, while the custom neck carve and sculpted five-bolt neck joint encourage fast, comfortable playing across the instrument's entire 34-inch scale. Every detail, from the lightweight tuning machines to the matte black hardware, contributes to exceptional balance and long-term reliability.

At the heart of the Bongo lies Music Man's powerful dual humbucking pickup system with neodymium magnets, paired with an 18-volt active 4-band preamp that offers extraordinary tonal flexibility. From pristine modern slap tones and articulate fingerstyle clarity to deep, aggressive rock and metal voices, the Bongo 6 delivers remarkable headroom and sonic authority. Complete with its softshell case, this American-built bass is an outstanding choice for professionals seeking extended-range capability, uncompromising craftsmanship, and limitless tonal possibilities.

Features / Specs

Highlights

  • Series: Bongo
  • Orientation: Right-Handed
  • Color: Stealth Black

Body

  • Body Material: Basswood
  • Body Finish: Matte
  • Body Shape: Bongo Double Cutaway
  • Body Style: Solidbody Bass

Neck

  • Headstock Type: Music Man Bongo 4+2
  • Neck Material: Painted Select Maple
  • Neck Shape: Music Man Custom Bongo Profile
  • Neck Finish: Matte
  • Neck Depth: 0.816" at 1st Fret, 0.898" at 12th Fret
  • Neck Construction: Bolt-On with Sculpted Neck Joint
  • Fingerboard Radius: 11"
  • Fingerboard Material: Ebony
  • Position Inlays: Custom Half-Moon Inlays
  • Side Dots: White
  • Number of Frets: 24
  • Truss Rod Style: Adjustable
  • Truss Rod Nut: Heel Wheel (No String Removal Required)
  • Nut Material: Compensated Nut
  • Nut Width: 2.25"
  • Fret Size: High Profile Wide Stainless Steel
  • Scale Length: 34"

Hardware

  • Bridge: Music Man Hardened Steel Bridge with Stainless Steel Saddles
  • Bridge Cover/Tail Piece: None
  • Bridge Mounting: Top Mounted
  • Pickguard: Matte Black
  • Pickup Covers: Matte Black
  • Control Knobs: Black Plastic Notched Dome-Style Knobs
  • Switch Tip: None
  • Hardware Finish: Matte Black
  • Tuning Machines: Custom Music Man Lightweight Open-Gear Tuners with Tapered String Posts
  • String Trees: None
  • Strings: Ernie Ball Slinky 6-String Bass (.032, .045, .065, .080, .100, .130)
  • Neck Plate: Sculpted 5-Bolt Neck Joint
  • Strap Buttons: Standard Music Man
  • Output Jack: Side-Mounted 1/4"

Electronics

  • Pickup Configuration: HH
  • Neck Pickup: Music Man Custom Neodymium Humbucker
  • Bridge Pickup: Music Man Custom Neodymium Humbucker
  • Controls: Master Volume, Pickup Blend, Treble, High Mid, Low Mid, Bass
  • Switching: Pickup Blend Control
  • Auxiliary Switching: 18-Volt Active 4-Band EQ Preamp

Miscellaneous

  • Accessories: Music Man Literature
  • Case/Gig Bag: Music Man Soft Case
  • Serial Number: K11871
  • Manufacture Date: 2026

item.title: Sterling StingRay Ray34SM 2022 - 3 Tone Sunburst — $723.07
item.description:
$723.07 · Excellent · Centre Musical EMF

The Sterling by Music Man StingRay Ray34SM is a 4-string bass inspired by the legendary Music Man StingRay, delivering the punch, clarity, and versatility that made the original famous. Made in Indonesia with excellent craftsmanship, it’s equally at home on stage or in the studio.

Its nyatoh body is topped with a stunning spalted maple top in a 3-Tone Sunburst finish, giving it a premium appearance. The powerful alnico humbucker, paired with a 3-band active preamp, provides a wide tonal range—from deep, punchy lows to articulate, sparkling highs.

The roasted maple neck offers excellent stability, fast playability, and outstanding comfort, making the Ray34SM as enjoyable to play as it is to hear.

Features

• Type: 4-string electric bass
• Year: 2022 April
• Made in Indonesia
• Body: Nyatoh with spalted maple top
• Neck: Roasted maple, bolt-on
• Fingerboard: Roasted maple
• Pickup: Music Man-style alnico humbucker
• Electronics: 3-band active preamp
• Bridge: High-mass StingRay-style bridge
• Finish: 3-Tone Sunburst

Condition:
• Used, excellent condition

item.title: G&L Fullerton Deluxe Fallout Bass 2023 - Purple Burst — $1,275
item.description:
$1,275 · Excellent · Tom's Gear Outlet

This is a beautiful "Purple Burst" G&L Fullerton Deluxe Fallout Bass in excellent condition. It only weighs 8.2 pounds. It is in perfect working order. Heavy duty G&L gig bag is included. There are very light blemishes on the back shown in last photo.

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass 62’ Reissue MIJ — $999.99
item.description:
$999.99 · Very Good · Nickles

A killer example of early‑90s MIJ craftsmanship, this 1991 Fender ’62 Reissue Jazz Bass delivers everything players love about the vintage‑style J: punchy articulation, smooth feel, and that unmistakable old‑school vibe. Finished in Sonic Blue that has aged beautifully over the decades, it’s the kind of bass that looks and sounds like a classic. Comes with a case too!


This bass has been played and loved. Expect some dings, small marks, and honest wear throughout—nothing that affects performance, just the kind of natural aging that gives MIJ instruments their charm. Frets are clean, the neck is straight, and all electronics function quietly and reliably.


Specs:

• 34” scale length — Classic Fender tension and punch

• 1.5” nut width — Slim Jazz profile, fast and comfortable

• Vintage‑style single‑coil pickups — Tight lows, scooped mids, clear top end

• Rosewood fingerboard with clay‑style dots

• 7.25” fingerboard radius — True vintage curvature

• Alder body — Lightweight and resonant

• Original MIJ hardware — Threaded‑saddle bridge, smooth tuners

• Top‑load bridge with period‑correct spacing

• Truss rod at heel — Vintage‑accurate construction

• Weight: Mid‑8 lb range (balanced and comfortable)

• Includes hard case — Clean, functional, and ready for transport or storage

item.title: Ibanez 2615B Artist Series Double Cutaway 4-String Bass 1970s - Natural Mahogany — $2,966.42
item.description:
$2,966.42 · Fair · Outlaw Axes

You don't see these come up very often, and if you've been looking for one, you already know how difficult they are to find.

This is an original Ibanez Artist 2615B with the original hard case (still wearing its Cosmo Music sticker). I am only the second owner.

The bass is surprisingly light—comparable to, or even lighter than, my Gibson SG bass.

Condition

This is a player's instrument, not a collector's museum piece.

  • Honest road wear throughout.
  • Original hardware with some surface rust on screws.
  • Strap button has been relocated.
  • Original electronics and active preamp are functioning.
  • Original pickups remain, with a vintage DiMarzio P-style pickup added in the middle by the original owner. There is a routed cavity beneath the pickguard for this modification.
  • Currently strung with Rotosound Swing Bass strings.

The original owner purchased it new from Cosmo Music in 1975 and toured extensively with it as his main bass. This bass was also used by Frank Sargent of Sons of Otis, and Ken Baluke often referred to this as "the Sons of Otis bass sound."

I've owned it for several years after searching nearly eight years to find one. The only reason it's for sale is because I've received a surprising amount of interest after posting it on social media. I never planned on selling it, but if someone has been looking for one, here's your opportunity. There is extra bridge and parts in the case.

The active preamp is exceptionally powerful and this bass has a huge, aggressive sound.

International buyers (USA): Please be aware that import duties, taxes, brokerage fees, and other customs charges are the buyer's responsibility.

This is a 50+ year-old vintage instrument and is being sold as-is with no warranties or returns. Because of its age, I cannot guarantee the future life of the truss rod, frets, electronics, or other components.

item.title: Vintage USA-Made Peavey Predator (1994) – Sleek Black S-S-S Workhorse — $239.95
item.description:
$239.95 · Very Good · Butler Music

Up for grabs is a fantastic piece of American guitar-building history: a , proudly crafted in the USA. Known among players as the ultimate sleeper guitar, this "S-Style" workhorse delivers incredible build quality, iconic versatility, and that unmistakable premium feel that only comes from vintage American craftsmanship.

The Specs & Layout

  • Origin: Made in the USA
  • Serial Number: 07159977 (Dating to 1994)
  • Finish: Gloss Black
  • Configuration: S-S-S (Three classic single-coil pickups for pure vintage chime, glass, and bite)
  • Hardware: Synchronized tremolo bridge (perfect for expressive pitch work)
  • Weight: An incredibly comfortable 7 lbs, 12.8 oz—perfectly balanced for long gigs or studio sessions without the shoulder fatigue.

Condition & Character

This guitar is in great overall condition and has been exceptionally well cared for over the past three decades. It features a couple of tiny, honest chips in the finish and some light swirl marks on the back of the body from normal playwear. These minor cosmetic imperfections only add to its authentic vintage character and do absolutely nothing to compromise its flawless structural integrity or playability.

What's Included

The guitar comes packed securely inside a premium, thick padded gig bag to ensure it stays protected on the road, at rehearsals, or in storage.

Whether you are looking for a highly reliable gigging machine, a bulletproof studio tool, or a premium American-made canvas for modifications, this Peavey Predator is ready to plug in and rock. Don't miss out on an iconic USA build that plays like instruments twice its price!

item.title: Roger Guitars (RBass) Stallion 2019 5-string — $3,000
item.description:
$3,000 · Excellent · Gear Boutique

Selling my one of a kind Rbass Stallion 5-string USA Bass built by Ray Roger. This bass is a work of art and sounds/plays like a dream. Custom Ulyate dual coil pickups with a series/parallel switch provides a ton of tonal possibilities. Recently setup and all electronics, pots checked to ensure clean contact. Selling as I am only play 4 string these days.


Here are some of the specs:

  • 9V Active Preamp
  • 2 band Noll preamp
  • Active passive switch
  • Series/Paralell switch
  • Ulyate Dual coil 5 string bass 17.5mm spacing
  • Spalted maple top
  • Mahogany Body 
  • Maple Neck 
  • Mahogany stringers
  • Rosewood fingerboard
  • Gotoh black tuners
  • 34" Scale Length
  • Brass nut
  • Weighs about 10lbs

item.title: Ibanez SR500 Soundgear 4-String Bass - Natural (MIK w/ ADX Pickups) — $400
item.description:
$400 · Very Good · My Beloved Memorabilia

Up for sale is a mid-1990s Ibanez SR500 Soundgear 4-String Bass in a classic Natural Flat finish. This specific era of South Korean production (manufactured at the respected Cor-Tek factory) is highly sought after for its superb craftsmanship, ultra-lightweight contoured solid maple body, and famously thin, fast-playing 3-piece maple neck. Unlike later mahogany models, this version features factory-original active Ibanez ADX P/J pickups (ADXP neck, ADXJ bridge) that deliver a punchy, aggressive modern tone that cuts perfectly through any mix.

Technical Specs:

 Body/Neck: Solid Maple body, 3-Piece Bolt-On Maple neck

 Fretboard: Rosewood, 24 Medium frets, 34" scale, slim 38mm nut width

 Pickups: Active Ibanez ADX P/J Set (ADXP/ADXJ)

 Controls: Volume, Pickup Balance, Active Bass Boost/Cut, Active Treble Boost/Cut

 Hardware: Original black die-cast tuners and fixed bridge

Condition Report:

 Cosmetic: Very Good. The natural wood finish looks great overall, but shows a few honest signs of use. There are visible finish chips on the headstock near the first few frets, as well as some chipping/wear along the bottom edge of the body. These are strictly cosmetic and do not affect the structural integrity or playability of the instrument.

 Neck & Frets: The neck is straight, the truss rod functions perfectly, and the rosewood fingerboard has plenty of fret life remaining.

 Electronics & Hardware: Fully operational. The active preamp and ADX pickups work flawlessly, and the control pots sweep cleanly without any static.

item.title: Fernandes Atlas 4 Deluxe Vintage 1995 Bass Guitar Black on Black w/ Hard Case — $950
item.description:
$950 · Excellent · Cardinal & Crane Guitar & Coffee Company

Fernandes Atlas 4 Deluxe 4 String Bass Guitar w/ Hard Case

Perfect almost new condition.

Seymour Duncan SMB humbucker with a 3-way switch (series/parallel/split)

Neck-through construction (maple neck through alder body)

Made in Korea, Extremely Rare!


15% Restocking Fee.


All items will ship in 3 business days. We discount shipping for multiple items. If you do need an item rushed, please contact me and I will try my best to accommodate you based on your schedule. Please feel free to contact me with any questions. I take great care to document all flaws in items and go overboard with shipping to make sure items get sent to you in the condition described. Thank you!
